---
title: "In-class worksheet"
author: "Fred Azizi"
date: "2022-08-31"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Question 1

You are shown a coin that its owner says is fair in the sense that it will produce the same number of heads and tails when flipped a very large number of times.

1. Describe an experiment to test this claim. 

2. What is the population in your experiment? 

3. What is the sample? 

4. What is the parameter?

5. What is the statistic?
